scripts.start: npx concurrently -k -n "backend,frontend" -c "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && php -S 127.0.0.1:8000 -t public" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n "backend,frontend" -c "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && php -S 127.0.0.1:8000 -t public" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: cd backend && composer install && php artisan migrate --seed && cd ../frontend && npm install
